subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thank you for following up. We would be happy to schedule a meeting to discuss a potential partnership.

We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which option works best for you, and we can confirm accordingly.

Regarding your request for direct internal contact details, we are not able to share internal email addresses or phone numbers. Please use the contact information available on our public website for the appropriate channels.

Best regards
